content: Railway private networking: services communicate via http://<service-name>.railway.internal:<PORT>. RAILWAY_PRIVATE_DOMAIN env var is set automatically. Services with no domain configured are internal-only — skip 'Generate Domain' in Settings>Networking to keep a service private. Use BACKEND_URL=http://${{sidecar.RAILWAY_PRIVATE_DOMAIN}}:${{sidecar.PORT}} reference syntax to bind internal URLs. FastAPI binds on '::' (all interfaces including IPv6) via uvicorn or hypercorn. New Railway envs (after Oct 2025) support both IPv4+IPv6 on private network.
